headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Eyes Letterboxd, Is The Stock Cheap?
summary: Comcast (CMCSA) is back in focus after reports that it is among several potential bidders for film social platform Letterboxd, a possible US$250 million deal that highlights competition for engaged streaming audiences. See our latest analysis for Comcast. Against a backdrop of rural broadband expansions in Florida and Georgia, strong box office results for Universal’s “The Odyssey” and fresh Letterboxd interest, Comcast’s 1 month share price return of 6.15% contrasts with a year to date share...
